'''Jacob Emmitt''' (born 4 October 1988) is a [[Wales national rugby league team|Wales]] international [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|pr}} for the [[Barrow Raiders]] in the [[RFL League 1]].<ref name="Profile at loverugbyleague.com"/><ref name="Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org"/>

He previously played for the [[Toronto Wolfpack]], [[St Helens R.F.C.|St Helens]], [[Castleford Tigers]], [[Leigh Centurions]], [[Salford Red Devils]] and the [[Swinton Lions]]. He has also spent time on loan at the [[Leigh Centurions]] and the [[Keighley Cougars]].

==Background==
Emmitt was born in [[Warrington]], [[Cheshire, England]].

==Playing career==
Emmitt began his career at St Helens. He joined [[Castleford Tigers|Castleford]] on a 2-year deal on 16 September 2010. The following month he represented Wales in the [[Alitalia European Cup]].

He signed an 18-month deal with [[Salford Red Devils|Salford]] in April 2013, but left Salford and signed a contract to return to [[Leigh Centurions|Leigh]] for the 2014 season.<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.leighcenturions.com/news/381|archive-url=https://archive.today/20140103114018/http://www.leighcenturions.com/news/381|url-status=usurped|archive-date=3 January 2014|title=Centurions Sign Jake Emmitt|date=3 January 2014|access-date=3 January 2014}}</ref>

In October and November 2013, He represented Wales in the [[2013 Rugby League World Cup]].

In October 2014, Emmitt played in the [[2014 European Cup (rugby league)|2014 European Cup]].<ref>{{Cite web |url=http://www.rlef.eu.com/news/article/899/kear-announces-welsh-train-on-squad |title=RLEF |access-date=26 September 2014 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140928092124/http://www.rlef.eu.com/news/article/899/kear-announces-welsh-train-on-squad |archive-date=28 September 2014 |url-status=dead }}</ref>

In October 2016, Emmit played in the [[2017 Rugby League World Cup qualification – Europe|2017 World Cup qualifiers]].

===Lymm RFC===
On 19 June 2020, it was announced that Emmitt would end his professional rugby league career and has joined [[Lymm RFC]].<ref>{{cite web|website=Warrington Guardian|date=19 Jun 2020|accessdate=7 May 2021|title=Former Toronto Wolfpack prop Jake Emmitt returns to Lymm RFC|url=https://www.warringtonguardian.co.uk/news/18528323.former-toronto-wolfpack-prop-jake-emmitt-returns-lymm-rfc/}}</ref>

===Barrow Raiders===
On 3 August 2021, it was reported that he had signed for [[Barrow Raiders|Barrow]] in the [[RFL League 1]].<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=3 Aug 2021|accessdate=4 Aug 2021|title=Barrow sign former Super League forward Jake Emmitt|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/barrow-sign-former-super-league-forward-jake-emmitt/}}</ref>
